channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Pick Arc over Toptal in 2026
item.description: Arc beats Andela and Toptal in 2026 payout speed and net earnings—median 5-day approval vs 14 and 23 days, 10 % fee vs 15–27 %, and $47 vs $35 effective hourly rate after cuts.

item.title: Misconfigured pool size kills prod
item.description: Cut database connection timeouts 80% with the right pool size formula — why CPU cores × 2 + 1 fails and what to use instead with PostgreSQL 16 and Node.js 20 LTS examples.

item.title: AI skills that move the $185k paycheck
item.description: Cut AI salary research time by 70% with 2026 data — prompt engineering vs vector search: concrete benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and hiring signals that actually move the needle.

item.title: AI coding wave: non-trads ship real products
item.description: Ship a production product in 2026 with AI tools that actually work. 45% latency drop, $120/month bill, and 8-hour setup time — the exact tools non-traditional devs use to go from prototype to profit.

item.title: Get $120k remote salary from US firms
item.description: Get $120k remote salary from US firms — salary data, scripts, and negotiation templates to close the gap from lower-cost countries in 2026.

item.title: Choose push tech that won’t break prod
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with WebSocket push — RAM, CPU and cost numbers for WebSockets vs SSE vs polling in 2026

item.title: Scale kills RAG pipelines fast
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 12× and costs 6× with pre-computed embeddings in RedisSearch 2.8. Benchmarks, code, and the mistakes most tutorials miss.

item.title: Ship African portfolios that clear remote screens
item.description: Build a remote portfolio that passes recruiter bots in under 90 seconds — Docker size ≤ 200 MB, cost bound, and one verifiable SLO. 2026 hiring numbers and real repo examples included.

item.title: Cellular backends: what changes with 5G users
item.description: Cut mobile API latency 60% — connection pool tuning, HTTP/3, Redis TTLs, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Vector DBs: when you actually need them
item.description: Cut vector search costs 26% with Postgres pgvector 0.7.0 — hardware sizing, payload filtering traps, and the 50 GB RAM rule every team should enforce in 2026.

item.title: Over-engineering: the $18k we wasted on Kafka
item.description: Cut infrastructure cost 84% by removing Kafka and fixing the real bottleneck — 3 slow queries and a misconfigured connection pool. Learn how to profile, measure, and simplify before reaching for complex architectures.

item.title: Charge $150/hr without burning out
item.description: Learn the real numbers behind freelance developer rates in 2026 — taxes, tools, and scope creep eat 40% of quoted rates. Build a dashboard that tracks your actual earnings per hour.

item.title: Connection pools are too small now
item.description: Cut database latency 40% by setting connection pool size to 80% of max_connections — not the old (core_count * 2) rule. Evidence from PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Redis in 2026.

item.title: RAG in prod? Skip the hello world
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 85% by moving reranking offline and caching everything. Real latency, cost, and memory numbers from a 2k QPS prod system.

item.title: AI side-projects survived prod
item.description: Cut onboarding time 35% with AI tools — Copilot Enterprise, Replit Agents, Continue.dev, Amazon Q CLI, and Codeium Enterprise. Real benchmarks, costs, and integration tips for 2026.

item.title: Choose the right real-time protocol fast
item.description: Pick the right real-time protocol in 30 seconds: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarks, latency, memory, and cost per 100k messages in 2026

item.title: Over-engineering: $24k/year mistake
item.description: Cut AWS costs $8k/month by replacing Kafka, Flink, and Redis clusters with Node.js 20 LTS, BullMQ 4.14, and Redis 7.2 — the real cost of over-engineering and how to avoid it

item.title: Skip the vector DB unless you measure first
item.description: Cut vector search latency 95% with Redis 7.2 + RedisSearch 2.8 — head-to-head benchmarks, cost breakdown, and the 3-question rubric most teams skip before choosing a vector database in 2026.

item.title: Stop burning money on mobile backends
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 85% with Redis 7.2 caching, pgbouncer 1.23 pooling, and Node 20 keep-alive tuning — the 3 metrics to watch when cellular radio drops

item.title: Leverage local costs for global remote pay
item.description: Negotiate remote pay like a pro with Notion template — living-cost model, salary bands, margin calculator, and negotiation scripts for 2026. Save $25k+ per year.
